config.NyapuExtraNPCs.name: Various NPCs
FarmKiwi.Jio.1: If Jio here, then Kiwi here, too.
FarmKiwi.Daia.1: Jio send Kiwi. Jio say check on Daia, stab if Daia being fool.
FarmKiwi.2: Kiwi see farmer and %spouse touch lips early in morning. Kiwi think humans are weird and dirty.
FarmKiwi.4: Kiwi help? Kiwi good at helping.
FarmKiwi.5: @ has big hut. Why hut so big when @ so tiny?
FarmKiwi.6: Kiwi hear strange noises from cave... Strange cave.
FarmKiwi.7: Kiwi bored! We leave farm soon?
FarmKiwi.8: When @'s grandma live here, here was much smaller. Kiwi remember.
FarmKiwi.9: Hmm... @ hut is nice, but Kiwi hut smells better.
